evidence.note: Taxonomic: Y Combinator delivers Seed Funding & Investment — it provides capital and investor access directly to early-stage founders. This is the primary output of the YC program. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Seed Funding is the required capability.
Taxonomic: Antler delivers Seed Funding & Investment — it co-founds companies from day zero and provides pre-seed capital as its primary offering. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Flexport delivers Supply Chain Sourcing — it provides end-to-end logistics execution and supplier coordination. The capability output (contracted, visible supply chain) is the primary deliverable of the Flexport platform. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Beehiiv delivers Community Growth Operations — it provides the infrastructure for audience acquisition, engagement, and retention. The platform output (subscribed, active community) is the primary deliverable. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Pentagram delivers Brand & Creative Direction — it provides end-to-end brand strategy and visual identity systems. The creative output (brand system, positioning) is the primary deliverable of the consultancy. No missionId required.
